reasoning_model_1: The model generates the sentence '请你好好想想再回答' with perfect content accuracy; every character is clear. model_comparison: Both models successfully produce natural, high-quality audio with accurate content. The deciding factor is the adherence to the specific constraint 'extremely slow' (极慢速). Model 1 (T1) executes this better by not only pausing between phrases but also elongating the pronunciation of individual characters, resulting in a significantly slower overall tempo that matches the 'extremely' intensifier.
